popularStory.headline: Find a Grave
popularStory.description:
Lady Elizabeth "Isabel" Stewart was born in Kintail, Ross, Ross & Cromarty, Scotland in 1513 to parents
Sir John / James IV "2nd Earl of Atholl" Stewart (1473–1513; F.A.G. #136400042) and
Lady Janet C …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail於大約1513年出生時，她的父親John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl39歲，母親Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl28歲。她於1530年與Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail在英國蘇格蘭洛-爾金泰爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1567年6月23日在英國蘇格蘭洛-爾金泰爾享年55歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可易阿爾斯 可爾內。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail于大约1513年出生时，她的父亲John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl39岁，母亲Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl28岁。她于1530年与Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail在英国苏格兰洛-爾金泰爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1567年6月23日在英国苏格兰洛-爾金泰爾享年55岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可易阿爾斯 可爾內。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail was born about 1513, her father, John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl, was 39 and her mother, Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl, was 28. She married Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail in 1530, in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 23 June 1567, in Kintail, Ross-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 55, and was buried in Earls Colne, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail est née environ 1513, son père, John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail en 1530, à Kintail, Ross-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 juin 1567, à Kintail, Ross-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterrée à Earls Colne, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1530 in Kintail, Ross-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintailが約1513年に生まれた時，父John Stewart 2nd Earl of Athollは39歳，母Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Athollは28歳であった。1530年にイギリススコットランドロス-シュアイアキンティイルでKenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintailと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1567年6月23日にイギリススコットランドロス-シュアイアキンティイルで55歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスエアルルズ コルンにて埋葬された。

ko.Cromarty, Ross & Cromarty, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티 크로마티
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail(이)가 대략 1513년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1530년 영국 스코틀랜드 로스-실르 킨테일에서 Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1567년 6월 23일 영국 스코틀랜드 로스-실르 킨테일에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 에를스 코니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail nasceu aproximadamente 1513, seu pai, John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail em 1530, em Kintail, Ross-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de junho de 1567, em Kintail, Ross-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 55 anos, e foi sepultada em Earls Colne, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Cromarty, Ross & Cromarty, Scotland: кромерти, росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth-nic-John Stewart of Atholl, latterly of Kintail родилась около 1513 г., её отцу по имени John Stewart 2nd Earl of Atholl было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet Campbell of Lennox - Countess of Atholl, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail в 1530 г. в местности кинтеил, росс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 23 июня 1567 г. в местности кинтеил, росс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет и была похоронена в местности эарлс колн, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Kenneth - Coinneach na Cuirc Mackenzie 10th of Kintail en 1530, en Kintail, Ross-shire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 8 hijas.
